summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR candidates. PR #93990 is routed to central security handling because its hydrated PR body cites CVE/security-shaped Windows spawn behavior, so ProjectClownfish should not triage it further. The other open PRs are non-security items, but none has the complete merge preflight required for a merge recommendation, primarily because Codex /review proof is absent and several mergeability states are unknown or unstable. Linked issues are kept related because post-merge closure is disabled and their candidate PRs are not yet merge-ready.
